meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve No Testing Knowledge
content.seo_description: Overcome testing anxiety as a freelancer. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate quality assurance and ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop letting a lack of testing knowledge delay your client deliveries. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you gain pre-configured testing suites that run automatically. Combined with Claude Code, you can generate, execute, and fix tests in real-time, ensuring professional-grade reliability without needing to be a QA engineer.
content.intro:
The client deadline is looming. You’ve written the feature, but a cold sweat sets in—how do you know it won't break the moment it hits production? For the modern freelancer, lack of formal testing knowledge is the silent project killer that turns profitable gigs into endless support nightmares.

But what if you could bypass the steep learning curve entirely? Enter the Antigravity project template. It acts as an architectural exoskeleton, providing the scaffolding for robust, automated testing out of the box. Coupled with the iterative power of Claude Code, you are no longer just a coder; you are a high-velocity engineer shipping bulletproof software.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Establish the foundation by cloning the Antigravity boilerplate. This ensures your project includes standardized linting, CI/CD pipelines, and test runners.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity boilerplate with TypeScript, Jest, and Playwright integrated.

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to analyze your core business logic and generate unit tests that cover edge cases you haven't even considered.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the src/services folder and generate comprehensive unit tests for all business logic functions using Jest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate unit tests for all files in /src/services'

steps.title: Implement Integration Testing
steps.description: Connect your API endpoints to the test suite to ensure database interactions and service layers communicate correctly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test suite for the user authentication API flow, ensuring database connections are mocked.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create integration tests for /api/auth endpoints'

steps.title: Enable End-to-End Visual Testing
steps.description: Leverage Playwright to simulate real user behavior, catching UI regressions that unit tests often miss.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a Playwright configuration file to run automated E2E tests for the landing page and checkout flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'setup playwright e2e tests for core user paths'

steps.title: Continuous Integration Hookup
steps.description: Automate the execution of your test suite on every git push, ensuring you never ship broken code to a client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow file that runs the full Antigravity test suite on every pull request.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate github-actions workflow for test execution'

pro_tips: Always use TDD (Test Driven Development) prompts with Claude Code to write the test before the feature code.
Use mock databases in your Antigravity config to keep test execution under 5 seconds for rapid feedback loops.
Configure your CI/CD to block deployments if test coverage drops below 80% to maintain high quality standards.
Use Claude Code to explain test failures; ask it to 'suggest a fix based on the stack trace' to save hours of debugging.
Keep your test data in a separate /fixtures directory to ensure test portability across different environments.
content.next_steps: Once your tests are running, integrate a monitoring tool to track performance metrics in production, effectively closing the loop from development to maintenance.
content.conversion_block: You now have the power to ship with the confidence of a lead architect. Stop guessing if your code works and start proving it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
